items.name: checks
items.doc: Collection of RulesTools static analysis checks — zero-literals, unwrap, doc comments, and more.

items.name: scan_project
items.doc:
Scan the project and emit `cargo:warning` for each violation.
Call this from `build.rs`.

Returns the total number of errors found.

items.name: scan_file
items.doc: Scan a single `.rs` file and return all issues.
